name: Glazed Fresh Apple Cookies
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup Apple juice or apple cider
recipeInstructions:
Recipe by: Favorite Recipes from Great Midwest Cooks
In a mixing bowl, beat brown sugar and shortening with an electric mixer on medium speed until well combined. Beat in egg until fluffy. In a separate bowl, combine flour, baking soda, cinnamon, 1/4 teaspoon salt, and cloves. Mix into the creamed mixture on low speed. Beat in apple juice or cider. By hand, stir in chopped apple, nuts, and raisins. Drop dough by slightly rounded tablespoons onto a greased cookie sheet. Bake at 400 degrees for 7 to 8 minutes or until edges are golden.
Glaze:
1 1/2 cups Powdered sugar; sifted
2 tablespoons Milk
1 tablespoon Margarine; softened
1/4 teaspoon Vanilla
1 dash Salt
